user.title: WattElse
user.description:
Everything on your electricity bill that isn't kilowatt-hours.

**Enter every kWh price in the Energy dashboard WITHOUT VAT** -- peak, off-peak, night and any other rate. WattElse adds the VAT as its own line, exactly like your bill does, so a tax-inclusive price would be taxed twice.

VAT is charged on every grid consumption source on the Energy dashboard, plus the standing charge and the levy. Never on the export credit -- money coming back to you is not taxed.

Leave a charge at 0 and it won't be created.

data.name: Name
data.show_rate_in_name: Show the rate in the source name

data_description.standing_charge: The fixed daily charge, excluding VAT. It accrues continuously.
data_description.levy_amount: A flat monthly fee such as Ireland's PSO levy, excluding VAT. It is charged in full when the month rolls over, never spread across the days, because a monthly fee prorated by day can never be right for both 30- and 31-day billing cycles.
data_description.vat_sources: Leave this empty and WattElse works it out on its own: it taxes every grid consumption source on the Energy dashboard, and never the export credit. Only fill it in if you want to override that -- for instance if one of your sources is billed tax-free.
data_description.show_rate_in_name: Puts the rate into the name shown on the Energy dashboard, so the Sources list documents the tariff it is charging you.

init.title: WattElse
init.description: Changing a rate only affects what accrues from now on. What you were billed in the past stays as it was billed. Remember that your kWh prices must stay VAT-free.

data.name: Name
data.show_rate_in_name: Show the rate in the source name

data_description.vat_sources: Leave this empty and WattElse works it out on its own: it taxes every grid consumption source on the Energy dashboard, and never the export credit. Only fill it in if you want to override that -- for instance if one of your sources is billed tax-free.

set_total.name: Set total
set_total.description: Overwrite the running total of a WattElse cost sensor.

entity_id.description: The WattElse cost sensor to overwrite.
